title: feat: add Sana image model
author: voodoohop
pr_body_excerpt:
- Adds Sana Sprint 1.6B to the shared image registry at 0.0001 Pollen per image, close to the estimated 0.0000926 GPU cost at full utilization.
- Routes Sana requests through the existing authenticated self-hosted GPU pool.
- Adds model-list, backend registration, dispatch, and billing coverage.

Checks:
- `npm run typecheck` in `gen.pollinations.ai`
- 55 relevant Vitest tests passed; focused Sana pricing tests rerun after the final price change

gist.headline: A swift new petal printer
gist.blurb: Sana Sprint 1.6B has joined the image garden. It makes pixels through the shared GPU hive for 0.0001 Pollen per image.
gist.summary: Added Sana Sprint 1.6B to the shared image registry, routed it through the authenticated self-hosted GPU pool, and priced generation at 0.0001 Pollen per image.
gist.impact: Developers can now select Sana Sprint 1.6B alongside existing image models, with model listing, dispatch, and billing all handled by the usual API path.
gist.visual_concept: Depict Sana Sprint as a fast, compact pixel-image printer in a cozy garden workshop, producing small finished landscape tiles from a lime-green glowing terminal. Polly wears tiny mechanic goggles and helps feed prompt cards into the printer while code-vines and flowers grow around the authenticated GPU cabinet, making the new model feel like a welcome tool added to the shared creative greenhouse.
gist.image_prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm garden workshop where Polly, the cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears tiny mechanic goggles while feeding prompt cards into a compact Sana Sprint image printer; the printer makes little pixel landscape tiles beside a retro GPU terminal glowing prominently lime green (#ecf874), with code-plants, flowers, and soft lavender-to-peach walls. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, chunky retro sprites, subtle CRT glow, emotionally warm.

image.prompt: Cozy pixel art scene in a warm garden workshop where Polly, the cute pixel art bee mascot with a yellow body, dark brown horizontal stripes, small black legs, two black antennae, black vertical oval eyes, bright pink rectangular cheek blush, a small happy smile, and small rounded light blue translucent wings, wears tiny mechanic goggles while feeding prompt cards into a compact Sana Sprint image printer; the printer makes little pixel landscape tiles beside a retro GPU terminal glowing prominently lime green (#ecf874), with code-plants, flowers, and soft lavender-to-peach walls. Cozy 8-bit pixel art aesthetic, soft pastel gradients, warm lighting, retro gaming vibes like Stardew Valley or A Short Hike, chunky retro sprites, subtle CRT glow, emotionally warm.
